<function=python>

# Check game state

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

# Check current frame
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['Y', 'R', 'b', 'M', 'c', 'N']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {n['boundary'][0][0]}-{n['boundary'][2][0]}, cols {n['boundary'][0][1]}-{n['boundary'][1][1]}")
</parameter>
</function>
